title: Close P8 governance state
objective:
Run script: """
from pathlib import Path
import json
p=Path('governance/tasks/pending/P8_FULL_ROLE_CYCLE_E2E.md')
d=Path('governance/tasks/done/P8_FULL_ROLE_CYCLE_E2E.md')
d.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
text=p.read_text() if p.exists() else d.read_text()
d.write_text(text+'\n\nP8 closed by BEM-524. Evidence SHA: cb20730a, 7bf96746, e8651edb, 43b440df, 9f7daaba. No issue comments. No schedule. No paid API.\n')
if p.exists(): p.unlink()
r=Path('governance/reports/bem524_p8_pass_report.md')
r.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
r.write_text('# BEM-524 | P8 PASS\n\nP8 Full Role Cycle E2E closed. Evidence: cb20730a, 7bf96746, e8651edb, 43b440df, 9f7daaba. Blocker: null.\n')
s=Path('governance/state/roadmap_state.json')
data=json.loads(s.read_text())
data['updated_at']='2026-05-17T05:45:00Z'; data['current_phase']='P9'; data['phase_title']='Handoff Protocol Claude↔GPT'; data['blocker']=None
pc=data.get('phases_completed',[])
if 'P8' not in pc: pc.append('P8')
data['phases_completed']=pc
data['phases_remaining']=[x for x in data.get('phases_remaining',[]) if x!='P8']
if 'P9' not in data['phases_remaining'] and 'P9' not in pc: data['phases_remaining'].insert(0,'P9')
s.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
changed_files += [str(d),str(r),str(s)]
ops_applied += ['closed P8, removed pending, wrote report, advanced roadmap to P9']
""" No issue comments.
